purpose: Synthetic PDFs for testing local PDF redaction tools. All personal data is fake.

expected_behaviors.01_text_pii_letter.pdf: Text extraction should find all fake PII; true redaction should remove it from extracted text.
expected_behaviors.02_table_mixed_identifiers.pdf: Tests redaction boxes around table cells and structured data.
expected_behaviors.04_rotated_and_small_text.pdf: Tests small text, rotated text, and coordinate mapping.
expected_behaviors.05_scanned_image_pdf_needs_ocr.pdf: Text extraction should find little or no text before OCR; OCR required.
expected_behaviors.06_intentionally_unsafe_black_box_overla: Looks redacted but is not; verification should still extract hidden text.
expected_behaviors.07_mixed_text_and_image_stamp.pdf: Tests both extractable text and image-embedded text that needs OCR.
expected_behaviors.08_form_like_layout.pdf: Tests form-style layout and line/box coordinate alignment.
